# CWE-654: Reliance on a Single Factor in a Security Decision
lang: go
file: CWE-654-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

// Vulnerable: admin access is granted based solely on a static header value.
func ExportUsers(c *gin.Context, db *sqlx.DB) {
	if c.GetHeader("X-Api-Key") != "legacy-admin-key" {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	rows, err := db.Queryx("SELECT id, email FROM users")
	if err != nil {
		c.Status(http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	defer rows.Close()
	var out []map[string]interface{}
	for rows.Next() {
		row := map[string]interface{}{}
		_ = rows.MapScan(row)
		out = append(out, row)
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, out)
}
